_meta.description: BSE closing prices on Jan 31 2018 — India LTCG grandfathering date (Finance Act 2018, Budget 2018-19). Prices are per SEBI/BSE bhavcopy. Use max(actual_cost, gf_price_adj) as cost basis for computing LTCG on pre-2018 lots.
_meta.note: Prices are RAW bhavcopy closes. The CG engine adjusts them for splits/bonuses via corporate_actions. Any mismatch between gf_price_raw and the CA-adjusted value signals a recorded corporate action post-2018.

ARE&M.note: Amara Raja Batteries — renamed to ARE&M (Amara Raja Energy & Mobility)

JETAIRWAYS.note: Suspended/bankrupt — GF price may not be meaningful

POONAWALLA.note: Formerly Magma Fincorp — renamed Poonawalla Fincorp 2021

IDFCFIRSTB.note: Predecessor: IDFC Bank. Merged with Capital First Dec 2018 to form IDFC First Bank

TATASTLLP.note: Formerly Tata Sponge Iron — renamed Tata Steel Long Products 2019
